# Google Maps review manipulation

## Signal layer

`local trust`

## Pattern to test

reviewers rate same businesses or category bursts.

## Graph representation

reviewer-business graph.

## Useful metrics

reviewer geography mismatch, text reuse, cross-business overlap.

## Verification question

Does the observed traction signal look more like independent behaviour or repeated coordinated/synthetic signalling?

## Evidence to combine

- network structure
- temporal bursts
- content similarity
- disclosure or incentive evidence
- actor history
- external reporting or platform/regulator evidence
- downstream quality of demand

## Examples / source anchors

Google Business Profile policy.

## Safe wording

"The observed pattern is consistent with `google maps review manipulation` risk indicators under the tested model. This does not by itself prove intent, fraud, or illegality."
